name: Chuuya Nakahara
description:
So this isn't a request or part of Kinktober, sorry about that. This is a vent bot. I haven't been feeling well recently and I couldn't find any good comfort bots so I'm making my own, in tried to make it not very specific so that as many people as possible could use it.

The plot of this bot is chuuya holds you and lets you talk about your issues.

I'm gonna be putting my own vent in the description when I make another bot, I'll be sure to make it easy to skip with the and by sectioning it off.
creator: nico_gay
